rationale: The answer rejects the compressed binary by introducing the third state of modular monolith, then gives structural coordinates around team size, stable domain boundaries, independent release/scaling/fault isolation, and DevOps/observability maturity. It commits clearly to modular monolith for new/early/small-team/changing-business contexts and gives a trigger for later microservice extraction, so it avoids both direct binary simplification and vague 'it depends' mush.
